examples.text: […]قُمْتُ مَعَ رَسُولِ اللهِ صَلَّىٰ اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ لَيْلَةً فَلَمَّا رَكَعَ مَكَثَ قَدْرَ سُورَةِ الْبَقَرَةِ يَقُولُ فِي رُكُوعِهِ " سُبْحَانَ ذِي الْجَبَرُوتِ وَالْمَلَكُوتِ وَالْكِبْرِيَاءِ وَالْعَظَمَةِ ".
examples.english: […] I stood [in prayer] with the Apostle of God — God shower blessing and well-being on him and grant [him] peace — one night and when he bowed he dwelt as long as [one could recite] the Sûra of the [Red] Cow. While bowing, he was saying, "Glorified be He with the power and the dominion, and greatness and majesty."

examples.text: […]قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ صَلَّىٰ اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ " سِتَّةٌ لَعَنْتُهُمْ لَعَنَهُمُ اللهُ وَكُلُّ نَبِيٍّ كَانَ الزَّائِدُ فِي كِتَابِ اللهِ وَالْمُكَذِّبُ بِقَدَرِ اللهِ وَالْمُتَسَلِّطُ بِالْجَبَرُوتِ لِيُعِزَّ بِذَٰلِكَ مَنْ أَذَلَّ اللهُ وَيُذِلَّ مَنْ أَعَزَّ اللهُ وَالْمُسْتَحِلُّ لِحَرَمِ اللهِ وَالْمُسْتَحِلُّ مِنْ عِتْرَتِي مَا حَرَّمَ اللهُ وَٱلتَّارِكُ لِسُنَّتِي ".
examples.english: […] The Apostle of God — God shower blessing and well-being on him and grant [him] peace — said, "There are six whom I have cursed and God and every prophet cursed. They are the one who adds to divine scripture, and the one who disbelieves in divine providence, and the one who exercises authority with tyranny to aggrandise those whom God abased and abase them whom God aggrandised, and the one who violates the divinely inviolable, and the one, out of my kin, who legitimates what God made illegitimate, and the one who forsakes my ways.
